gold_items.notes: Procedural directive for commission to approve prior meeting minutes. Actor is the commission as a body acting on its own record.

gold_items.source_quote: Approval of a waiver to Section 31-102(b)(2) of the Subdivision Ordinance to not require the extension of Denton Marl Drive through the plat
gold_items.notes: Staff-recommended waiver directive. Action is specific (waive Section 31-102(b)(2) for Denton Marl Drive extension).

gold_items.source_quote: Conditional approval of the final plat upon meeting the platting comments in the staff report
gold_items.notes: Conditional directive. Ambiguity expected because 'platting comments in the staff report' is a pointer to an external document whose contents are not in the excerpt. The directive itself is explicit; its conditions are opaque within this source.

gold_items.source_quote: Conditional approval of the plat vacation upon meeting the comments in the staff report
gold_items.notes: Same conditional pattern as G003. Action explicit, conditions reference external staff report.

gold_items.source_quote: Conditional approval of the plat vacation upon meeting the comments in the staff report
gold_items.notes: Identical template to G004, different case. Tests whether extractor distinguishes same-phrasing-different-case or deduplicates incorrectly.

gold_items.source_quote: Approval of a recommendation to City Council for the vacation of portions of 10th Avenue, Pruitt Street, and West Cannon Street, and an alley in Block 7, Edward Heirs Addition
gold_items.notes: Directive to recommend vacation to City Council. Action specific (named streets + alley + block). Actor explicit (staff to commission to council). Cross-body referral is structurally meaningful.

gold_items.source_quote: Approval of a recommendation to City Council for the vacation of a portion of a right-of-way easement for Avondale Haslet Road
gold_items.notes: Parallel directive to G006. Tests extraction consistency across similar directive patterns.

gold_items.source_quote: Approval of waiver to Section 31-106(d)(2) of the Subdivision Ordinance to allow the block face for Lots 12-41 to exceed the maximum allowed 1,320 feet in length
gold_items.notes: Waiver directive with numeric threshold (1,320 feet). Tests numeric preservation in extraction.

gold_items.source_quote: Conditional approval of the revised preliminary plat upon approval of the requested rezoning
gold_items.notes: This is a HOLD not a clean directive. The approval is contingent on a DIFFERENT body (rezoning authority) taking a different action. A governed extractor should surface this as an unresolved dependency, not as a simple approval directive.

gold_items.source_quote: Conditional approval of the revised preliminary plat upon meeting the comments in the staff report
gold_items.notes: Same template as G003-G005. In this case it is the third clause of a three-part recommendation, testing multi-clause directive decomposition.

Vacant seat in a body that must vote. Not a directive but a governance posture signal — quorum risk. Extractor correctness here tests whether absence-of-member is captured as state. Second vacancy: 'Vacant, Alternate'.

negative_controls.description: ADA accessibility statement — boilerplate, should NOT be extracted as directive or hold
negative_controls.source_quote_sample: Persons with disabilities who plan to attend this meeting and who may need accommodations

negative_controls.description: Executive Session notice — procedural boilerplate, should NOT be extracted
negative_controls.source_quote_sample: A closed Executive Session may be held with respect to any posted agenda item

negative_controls.description: Survey/legal descriptions — geographic context, NOT directives themselves
negative_controls.source_quote_sample: Being 29.8436 acres situated in the Alexander F. Albright Survey, Abstract No. 1849

structural_notes.note: Per Pro correction: gold annotations do not carry confidence_tier or authority_chain as primary fields. Those are downstream layer concerns and would smuggle downstream semantics into calibration truth.
